center.name: Mongabay
center.summary: Mongabay是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紫藍金剛鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last=Franco Berton |first=Eduardo |date=16 May 2018 |website=Mongabay Latam |language=es |publisher=Environmental News |access-date=31 October 2021 }} and locals often feed the macaws maize, like chickens. In the early 1990s it became apparent the species also occurred in the remote Noel Kempff Mercado National Park area a few hundred kilometres northward. Most of the Bolivian population of this macaw is thought to be found in the San Matías Integrated Management Natural Area, an area with extensive pantanal (swamp).{{cite journal |last1=Pinto-Ledezma |first1=Jesús N
